pkgmetadata.longdescription: Oculante is a no-nonsense, hardware-accelerated image viewer written in Rust. It supports a wide range of formats (including AVIF, JPEG XL, HEIF, OpenEXR, HDR and camera raw), non-destructive editing, EXIF inspection and per-channel analysis, with a GPU-accelerated rendering backend.

use.flag: Enable HEIF/HEIC image support via media-libs/libheif
